reviews.comment:
Un lugar muy lindo ,amplio,limpiooo,...Muy importante para el q va viajando ,los baños para destacar la limpieza y el servicio .tenés papel higiénico en todos ,y a la entrada un rollo gigante para manos ,jabón para asearte y papel para secarte .Aunque no te cobran hay para dejar dinero a voluntad .Imposible irte sin dejar ,considero q es una manera de agradecer el servicio q te brindan .Lastima q allí me deje un buzo en la silla del bar .

(Translated by Google)
A very nice, spacious, and clean place... Very important for travelers, the bathrooms are outstanding for their cleanliness and service. They all have toilet paper, and at the entrance there's a giant roll of hand soap and paper towels. Although they don't charge, there's a place to leave a tip. It's impossible to leave without giving one; I consider it a way to thank them for their service. It's a shame I left my sweatshirt on the bar chair.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNnJEdjNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
10 puntos para hacer una parada cargar nafta, tomar un café o comer algo. Baños limpios, se puede parar también a picar algo al lado ya que hay un área verde con mesas y bancos y hasta una pequeña plaza para los más chicos.

(Translated by Google)
10 points for stopping to fill up with gas, grab a coffee, or get something to eat. Clean restrooms, and you can also stop for a snack nearby since there's a green area with tables and benches, and even a small playground for children.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNHVPWWJBEAE
